articles.description: Official sources said the J&K government, unlike the Lieutenant Governor administration, intended to form a committee to look into the lease issues and auctions

articles.title: CTET February 2026 result soon: What are the qualifying marks and latest updates?
articles.description: CTET February  result soon What are the qualifying marks and latest updates

articles.title: Sonia Gandhi health update: Congress MP stable, on antibiotics; Rahul Gandhi visits Sir Ganga Ram Hospital
articles.description: Sonia Gandhi admitted to Sir Ganga Ram Hospital with infection; doctors say she is stable and responding to antibiotics. Rahul Gandhi cancels Kerala visit to be by her side.

articles.title: Malayalam actor-director E.A. Rajendran dies at 71
articles.description: Rajendran was the brother-in-law of actor Mukesh and the son-in-law of noted theatre director O. Madhavan

articles.title: In a first, US Postal Service to add fuel surcharge amid soaring energy prices
articles.description: In a first US Postal Service to add fuel surcharge amid soaring energy prices

articles.title: Autorickshaw knocks down woman, driver arrested for dumping body behind bus stop in west Bengaluru
articles.description: The auto driver had taken the injured woman to a nearby hospital, but was advised by doctors to shift her to a speciality hospital for treatment

topStories.title: US lawmakers push for pause in data centres until AI safeguards in place
topStories.description: Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez introduce bill to pause AI rollout amid growing backlash to technology.

topStories.title: US Troop Movements Fan Fears Of A Risky Ground Attack On Iran
topStories.description: Iran has publicly rejected Trump's diplomatic outreach and threatened massive retaliation if the US does put boots on the ground in a bid to break Tehran's will.

topStories.title: Russia slams second US-Israeli strike at Iran’s Bushehr nuclear reactor
topStories.description: Russia’s foreign ministry has accused the US and Israel of trying to spark a nuclear disaster after a strike at Bushehr.

topStories.title: "It Was Already Open": Pak's Khawaja Asif Mocks US' Hormuz "War Goal"
topStories.description: Iran has dismissed an American plan to pause the war, issuing its own counterproposal instead, as it launched more attacks on Israel and Gulf Arab countries.

topStories.title: US jury finds Meta, Google, liable in social media addiction trial
topStories.description: A Los Angeles jury has found Alphabet's Google and Meta liable for $6 million in a landmark social media addiction case.

topStories.title: LNG Buyers Hunt For Deals In US After Qatar Is Shut From Market
topStories.description: The majority of producers on the Gulf Coast are running their plants at near capacity, and much of their supply is already under long-term contract.

topStories.title: Trump Insists GOP Is The 'Hot Party' Despite Midterm Headwinds
topStories.description: Republicans have suffered a string of losses in off-cycle elections since Trump took office, with voters frustrated over the cost of living and his immigration policies.

topStories.title: Live: US Aircraft Carrier Continuing Operations; Tehran Issues Conditions
topStories.description: Iran War Live Updates: The Trump administration had offered a 15-point ceasefire plan to Iran, a proposal rejected by Tehran.

topStories.title: Harrison: ‘There is going to be some kind of a military escalation.’
topStories.description: Ross Harrison says public talk of diplomacy between the US and Iran is hiding hardline positions.

topStories.title: Abbas Araghchi says Iran reviewing US proposal to end war in Middle East, rules out direct talks with US
topStories.description: Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has said Iran is considering a US proposal to end the Gulf war but firmly rejects direct negotiations. With escalating tensions and military actions, Iran seeks a resolution on its own terms while emphasising the inclusion of Lebanon in any ceasefire agreement.

topStories.title: Supreme Court forms SIT of three women IPS officers to probe 4-year-old's rape case in Gurugram
topStories.description: The Supreme Court observed that the “trauma of the child was multiplied as a result of insensitive, reckless and irresponsible… method of investigation.”

dailyNews.title: Missing woman’s sister says Nancy Guthrie case now a ‘hope roller coaster’ for family as search continues
dailyNews.description: Julie Murray, whose sister Maura Murray vanished in 2004, warns that urgency fades in missing cases as Nancy Guthrie remains missing after 50 days.

dailyNews.title: Illegal immigrant accused of groping girls at Virginia high school facing new charges
dailyNews.description: An illegal immigrant accused of groping female students at Fairfax High School in Virginia was served with four more counts after additional victims came forward.

dailyNews.title: New Jersey Gov Sherrill signs law barring ICE agents from wearing face coverings to shield identities
dailyNews.description: New Jersey Gov. Mikie Sherrill signed a law that limits face coverings for ICE agents and requires them to present identification before detaining someone.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin makes new criminal referrals to DOJ targeting New York AG Letitia James
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has made criminal referrals to the DOJ alleging New York AG Letitia James committed homeowners insurance fraud, officials confirmed.

dailyNews.title: Gorman family calls out Johnson and Pritzker following college student's killing in Chicago
dailyNews.description: The Gorman family is demanding accountability from Chicago and Illinois leaders, rejecting their 'senseless tragedy' framing of Sheridan's death.

dailyNews.title: Iran is 'trying to give the global economy a heart attack' by closing Strait of Hormuz, UAE minister says
dailyNews.description: United Arab Emirates official Lana Nusseibeh criticized Iran's restrictions on the Strait of Hormuz and its use of ballistic missiles and drones during an interview with Fox News.

dailyNews.title: Journalist tells San Francisco board ‘Nick Shirley’s coming to town’ amid fentanyl, crime concerns
dailyNews.description: A public comment at the San Francisco Board of Supervisors raises concerns over fentanyl deaths, crime, and homelessness, as a speaker warns “Nick Shirley’s coming to town."

dailyNews.title: DOJ settles with Michael Flynn over Russia probe after wrongful prosecution claim: 'Historic injustice'
dailyNews.description: The DOJ settled with former Trump national security adviser Michael Flynn for a reported $1.2 million, calling it a step to redress what it described as a "historic injustice."

dailyNews.title: Wine, beer or liquor: Study finds one drink is linked to lower risk of death than others
dailyNews.description: A new study found moderate wine drinkers had a 21% lower cardiovascular death risk, while beer and spirits raised risk even at low intake levels. Experts urge caution.

dailyNews.title: Cop on trial denies gunning for fellow officer in clash at home; prosecutors argue lethal risk was real
dailyNews.description: Former North Andover Officer Kelsey Fitzsimmons testified she never aimed her gun at Officer Patrick Noonan, claiming she was attempting suicide when shot.

dailyNews.title: US moves airborne troops, Marines as Iran rejects ceasefire, raising ground war potential
dailyNews.description: The U.S. deployed the 82nd Airborne and thousands of Marines and sailors to the Middle East, and experts say limited Iran operations could target the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Jimmy Kimmel's dig at 'plumber' DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin ripped as 'elite' by online critics
dailyNews.description: ABC late-night host Jimmy Kimmel faced backlash after mocking newly confirmed DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin as an unqualified plumber during his monologue.

topStories.description: House Republicans will push a second budget reconciliation bill to fund Trump's Iran campaign and cut fraud in social services, House Budget Committee Chair Arrington said.

topStories.description: Bruce Springsteen doubled down on his political stances ahead of a "No Kings" rally in St. Paul and his 20-day "Land of Hope and Dreams American Tour."

topStories.description: Much of the frustration during the briefing for the House Armed Services Committee focused on the prospect of sending U.S. ground troops to Iran, sources said.

topStories.title: Trump might be eyeing Iran's Kharg Island. Here's why that's a risk.
topStories.description: The U.S. could try to seize Iran's Kharg Island, an offshore terminal which 90% of its crude oil exports pass.

topStories.title: Inside Trump's daily video montage briefing about the Iran war
topStories.description: WASHINGTON — Each day since the start of the war in Iran, U.S. military officials compile a video update for President Donald Trump that shows video of the biggest, most successful strikes on Iranian targets over the previous 48 hours, three current U.S. officials and a former U.S. official said

topStories.title: Trump housing official seeks new DOJ prosecution of Letitia James
topStories.description: Federal Housing Finance Agency Director Bill Pulte made two criminal referrals that allege the New York attorney general committed insurance fraud.

topStories.title: DOJ says it erroneously relied on ICE memo to justify immigration courthouse arrests
topStories.description: The Trump administration admitted in a court filing that it had erroneously relied on an ICE memo to justify arrests at immigration courthouses as part of an ongoing federal case brought by groups seeking to block the tactic.

dailyNews.title: Venezuelan sent to El Salvador's CECOT prison files $1.3M lawsuit against Trump admin
dailyNews.description: Neiyerver Adrián Leon Rengel was subjected to "inhumane and overcrowded conditions as well as extreme psychological trauma" and denied counsel, his attorney Norm Eisen said.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration to pay Michael Flynn in settlement over earlier prosecution
dailyNews.description: The former national security adviser sued during the Biden administration, alleging he was "politically targeted" for his association with Donald Trump's 2016 campaign.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump walks side by side with humanoid robot at White House summit
dailyNews.description: The Figure 03 robot, which is not currently available for direct-to-consumer purchase, works through a vision-language-action AI model.

dailyNews.title: Ukraine's unique role in the Iran war: From the Politics Desk
dailyNews.description: As President Donald Trump slams fellow NATO members as “cowards” for not leaping into the war against Iran, an unlikely European country has been helping Gulf nations defend themselves from Iranian drones.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Threats to Europe Put Its Leaders in a Double Bind Over Iran
dailyNews.description: European politicians risk angering their voters if they join America’s war. Yet they could also face domestic upheaval if they take no action to reopen shipping routes that Iran has blocked and ease an energy crisis.

dailyNews.title: Trump Had His Eye on China, Then Plunged Into a New Mideast War
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration said the Middle East would “recede” in importance as the China challenge took priority. But the president started the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump Appears With a Robot, Saying More Children Should Be Educated by Them
dailyNews.description: The first lady, Melania Trump, believes that more children should be educated by “humanoid educators.”

dailyNews.title: Trump to Delay Nominating New C.D.C. Director
dailyNews.description: The administration has yet to find a candidate who aligns with Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s agenda while avoiding his unpopular stance on vaccines.

dailyNews.title: Kate Marvel, Prominent Climate Scientist, Resigns From NASA
dailyNews.description: Kate Marvel, a well-known author, joins an estimated 95,000 people who have left federal science agencies since President Trump returned to the White House.

dailyNews.title: Justice Dept. Settles Flynn’s Wrongful Prosecution Suit for $1.25 Million
dailyNews.description: The agreement was an extraordinary example of how the Trump administration has offered legal relief to those aligned with the president.

dailyNews.title: How U.S.A.I.D. Birth Control Meant for Africa Was Ruined
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration had options for offloading contraceptives once destined for Africa, a newly obtained memo shows. Instead, it has let them collect dust and go bad.

dailyNews.title: White House says Trump will "unleash hell" if Iran doesn't make deal
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said talks between Washington and Tehran were ongoing, hours after Iran's state media said the regime rejected proosals by the Trump administration.
